description_long: This object is a cylindrical cup with a slightly flared rim, resembling an instant ramen container commonly found in urban convenience stores. The exterior is decorated with a red and orange color scheme, featuring vertical white stripes and a checkered yellow band near the base, evoking a classic instant noodle packaging design. The lid is sealed and appears to be made of a thin, slightly crinkled material, with white and tan graphics printed on top. The surface texture is matte with a subtle grid pattern, suggesting a printed paper or thin plastic wrap. No contents or interior details are visible, as the lid is fully intact. The object is lightweight and portable, suitable for single-serving use.
description: A sealed, cylindrical instant ramen cup with a red, orange, and white printed design and a matte, slightly textured surface. The lid is intact, and the container is lightweight and portable.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cup's main label with bold white vertical stripes on a red background and a sealed tan lid with white graphics.
description_view_1: This side view reveals more of the checkered yellow band and a partial graphic element, with the lid's graphics extending toward the back.
description_view_2: This angle highlights a large white panel on the side, likely for nutritional or branding information, with less visible striping.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a mostly red surface with a vertical white stripe and the checkered band, with minimal graphic detail on the lid.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is a tapered cylinder made of paper or thin plastic, with a wide, slightly flared rim and a sealed lid. Its exterior features a bold red background with vertical white stripes, a yellow checkered band near the base, and a tan lid with white printed graphics. The design is simple yet vibrant, typical of instant ramen packaging.
attribute_topping_arrangement: No toppings are visible as the lid is fully sealed, obscuring any view of the contents or arrangement inside. The presentation is that of an unopened, ready-to-eat ramen cup.
attribute_noodle_visibility: Noodles are not visible; they are completely covered by the sealed lid, with no exposure above the rim.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth is not visible due to the intact lid, so its clarity or opacity cannot be assessed.
attribute_utensil_presence: No utensils are present in or around the bowl in any of the images.
